## LibraryRuntime.Indexers.FillingRecipeResolver type

Filling recipe resolver function type. Provided by RuntimeContext to resolve filling recipe IDs to entities.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type FillingRecipeResolver = (id: FillingId) => Result<IRuntimeFillingRecipe>;
```
